selection_policy.canonical_identity_rule: Demo ELI URI is canonical; SCIJ nValor tuple is source identity; legacy norm.id is diagnostic only.
selection_policy.article_policy: No article-level canonical claims unless separately verified.
selection_policy.gaceta_policy: Publication hints may be used as bibliographic evidence; legacy segmentation is not canonical.

resource_count_policy.description: The Demo resource count is not fixed at four; use the smallest approved set that satisfies the Demo acceptance needs, including the required law-decree or law-regulation relation.

relation_partner_status.evidence_note: SCIJ related-surface evidence for 1:95992:139872 records Ley 7092 with Afectacion: Reglamentacion and Modo: Expreso. The direct ley_7092 norm_reglamentacion row was not found in the inspected legacy DB.

future_expansion_policy.direction: The Demo may later expand toward a broader SCIJ raw-backed corpus after the small approved set proves the evidence-to-MCP path.
constraints: Do not use legacy norm.id as canonical identity.
Do not use legacy article counts as canonical truth.
Do not use legacy Gaceta segmentation as canonical document evidence.
Scale only through preserved evidence, manifests, provenance, validation, and approved URI policy.

resources.title: Constitucion Politica de la Republica de Costa Rica
demo_role: Multiple SCIJ source identifiers with explicit caveats
known_caveats: Historical chain incomplete: 6 versions persisted of 28 observed.
Publication not reconciled to local Gaceta PDF.
Article-level canonicalization is out of scope.
resources.next_action: Human approval of constitution as one of the concrete Demo resources and approval of exact evidence fixtures.

resources.title: Ley del Impuesto sobre la Renta
demo_role: Anchor for the required verified law-decree or law-regulation relation
known_caveats: Historical chain incomplete: 30 versions persisted of 83 observed.
Article count is unreliable in the audit sample.
Original Gaceta PDF is not local in the audited corpus.
A candidate partner has been located: Decreto Ejecutivo 43198-H / Reglamento de la Ley del Impuesto sobre la Renta, pending human approval and fixture preservation.
must_not_claim: Final law-decree relation readiness before human approval and fixture preservation
resources.next_action: Approve or reject Decreto Ejecutivo 43198-H as the relation partner, then preserve the selected SCIJ evidence fixtures if approved.

resources.title: Ley para garantizar la transparencia en la eleccion de la Presidencia del Concejo Municipal

evidence.publication_hint: Gaceta 226 del 02/12/2025 Alcance 154; PDF listed as /mnt/Tokyo/Lab/Git/Plaza/archive/old/data/sources/gaceta/raw/gaceta_2025-12-02.pdf

known_caveats: Gaceta publication hint does not validate legacy Gaceta segmentation.
Article-level canonicalization is out of scope even though the law is simple.
resources.next_action: Human approval of this concrete resource or replacement by an alternate simple law.

resources.title: Reglamento de la Ley del Impuesto sobre la Renta
demo_role: Verified law-decree or law-regulation relation partner for ley_7092
Evidence-backed basis relation candidate using eli:based_on and eli:basis_for
known_caveats: The decisive relation evidence was found on the candidate decree/regulation related surface, not as a direct ley_7092 norm_reglamentacion row.
The relation does not prove complete regulatory coverage for Ley 7092.
Article-level canonicalization is out of scope.
must_not_claim: Final Demo acceptance readiness before fixture preservation, graph generation, and validation
resources.next_action: Human approval of this verified relation partner and approval of exact evidence fixtures before graph implementation.
